name: Artifact Human Review Pipeline
description: Artifact-only workflow with a human review gate and no repository dependency.
outcome: An operator-approved artifact packet advances without repository-backed work.

definition.process_instructions: The artifact brief author drafts the packet. The artifact editor prepares it for operator review. A human review gate decides approval. Only after approval may the artifact release planner assemble the final artifact-only release packet.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: approval-gate
stages.goal: A human decision exists for the brief.

stages.name: launch-packaging
stages.goal: The approved launch packet is ready.

checkpoints.name: approval-gate
checkpoints.goal: A human decision exists for the brief.

checkpoints.name: launch-packaging
checkpoints.goal: The approved launch packet is ready.
